name: python3-requests-toolbelt
title: python3-requests-toolbelt
summary: Utility belt for advanced users of python3-requests
description:
Utility belt for advanced users of python3-requests
Collection of utilities for python3-requests
It provides transport adapters: FingerprintAdapter, SSLAdapter,
SourceAddressAdapter, SocketOptionsAdapter, TCPKeepAliveAdapter
and authenticators: AuthHandler, GuessAuth, HTTPProxyDigestAuth
Also a cookiejar, streaming helpers and more.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests-toolbelt because Utility belt for advanced users of python3-requests.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests-toolbelt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests-toolbelt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests-toolbelt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
